title: perezia scalpellifolia
intro: Perezia scalpellifolia, also known as the tree orris, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Perezia scalpellifolia include its use as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic agent. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to help with digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Traditionally, Perezia scalpellifolia is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and its roots are also used to make a powder for topical applications.
